title: asplenium indicum var. obtusum
intro: Asplenium indicum var. obtusum, commonly known as the Indian asplenium or obtuse spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asplenium indicum var. obtusum include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, skin disorders, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Asplenium indicum var. obtusum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
